'''U Wanna Wanna''' was [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley's]] biggest outdoor market, where [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] and craft could be purchased. Barring when [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine's]] [[Gravel storm/Legends|gravel storms]] reached magnitudes of four or above, it was always open.

{{Loc-stub}}
